plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Remove AI phrasing from any content. Zero config — works on any text.

plugins.name: brand-voice
plugins.description: Define and enforce your own brand voice rules. Catches banned phrases, weak openers, and off-brand patterns.

plugins.name: research-digest
plugins.description: Weekly content research engine. Searches Reddit, HN, and the web for your topics and scores what to write next.

plugins.name: notes-generator
plugins.description: Turn any article into 3–5 ready-to-post Substack notes using a content-type formula system.

plugins.name: build-in-public
plugins.description: Turn a build update, lesson, or shipping moment into a ready-to-post piece.

plugins.name: newsletter-engine
plugins.description: Full newsletter production system — research, draft, humanize, SEO, publish to Substack. Premium.

plugins.name: ai-builder-toolkit
plugins.description: Complete content system for AI builders publishing in public. Weekly cadence, content pillars, distribution. Premium.
